S-prep-01.title: Nested XBRL tags stripped with all text content preserved
S-prep-01.expected: All XBRL tags unwrapped, text preserved

S-prep-02.title: Style stripping distinguishes decorative from structural
S-prep-02.expected: Decorative removed, text-align kept, hidden removed

S-prep-03.title: Older filings with font-tag content not emptied
S-prep-03.expected: Content preserved, font tags unwrapped, non-empty

S-conv-01.title: Semantic HTML headings convert to ATX Markdown

S-conv-03.title: Converter fallback triggers correctly
S-conv-03.actual: Import-time, RuntimeError, and empty output all fallback correctly

S-conv-04.title: Both adapters produce ATX headings
S-conv-04.expected: ATX headings from markdownify, no Setext
S-conv-04.actual: MarkdownifyAdapter and fallback path produce ATX headings

S-store-05.title: All required metadata fields present and correctly typed
S-store-05.expected: All 10 metadata fields present and typed

J-store-01.title: Multi-ticker filing lifecycle through the store
J-store-01.expected: Correct isolation by ticker and FY

S-dl-01.title: Cache determines whether SEC is contacted
S-dl-01.expected: Cache hit skips download; omitted FY contacts SEC
S-dl-01.actual: Cache hit worked, omitted FY resolved correctly

S-dl-03.title: Non-calendar FY stores with correct fiscal_year
S-dl-03.expected: FY in path/metadata aligns with edgartools

S-dl-06.title: Lowercase/uppercase tickers produce identical results
S-dl-06.actual: Ticker normalized to uppercase at pipeline and store level

S-dl-05.title: Invalid inputs produce distinct, actionable error types
S-dl-05.expected: 4 distinct error types for 4 invalid inputs

S-dl-02.title: Batch processes multiple tickers with mixed outcomes
S-dl-02.actual: NVDA: success (cache=True), AAPL: success (cache=True), FAKECORP: error

S-dl-07.title: Overlapping writes produce a complete, valid file
S-dl-07.actual: Atomic writes via temp file + rename prevent corruption

J-dl-02.title: JIT cache miss → download → cache hit
J-dl-02.actual: FY=2026, all 3 calls return same parsed_at

J-dl-03.title: Force re-process corrects bad cached output
J-dl-03.actual: Corrupted read OK, force re-process updated parsed_at, content restored

J-prep-01.title: Real filing HTML through full preprocess produces intact content

J-conv-01.title: Full pipeline produces structured Markdown
J-conv-01.expected: Valid frontmatter, ≥3 headings, tables, no HTML, >10KB
